top_signals.title: Here we go again? Assessing the inflation risks of the recent energy shock − speech by Megan Greene
top_signals.summary: Given at University of Derby Business School
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO Stress Tests Crypto’s Bid to Reinvent Stock Markets
top_signals.summary: For years, crypto firms have argued that blockchain technology could create markets for private companies long before they reach Wall Street. SpaceX provided the industry’s biggest test yet. The results were mixed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Bank of England and Financial Conduct Authority – Memorandum of Understanding on the supervision of Financial Market Infrastructure
top_signals.summary: Joint statement from the Bank of England and Financial Conduct Authority
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Cook, The Opportunities and Risks AI Presents for the Economy and Financial System
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Stanford Institute for Economic Policy Research, Stanford University, Stanford, California
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Redwire and the Space Infrastructure Boom
top_signals.summary: As investors pile into the space sector following SpaceX's blockbuster debut, Redwire Chairman and CEO Peter Cannito joins "Bloomberg Open Interest" to discuss the next phase of the space economy and the infrastructure needed to support it. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Episode 91: Royal Ascot 2026 – Day 1 & 2
top_signals.summary: Tom Marriott and Bill Esdaile are back to preview the opening two days of Royal Ascot 2026, with analysis and selections across the cards. Trainer of Overpass, Bjorn Baker, joins to discuss his sprinter’s chances in the King Charles III Stakes on Tuesday. Check back on Wednesday for a preview of the rest of the [...]
